fr:title.text: How to code your own type theory

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: How to code your own type theory

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: There is a considerable distance between the formal rules of type theory and the code that you must write in order to animate them as a running program. In this colloquium, you will learn the basic techniques of type theoretic implementation in the OCaml programming language, including the representation of syntax as well as type-directed conversion.
